This weeks specials are:

(June 5th through June 18th)

Garlic Soup

A chicken broth based soup with the wonderful flavor of fresh garlic. Served with egg, croutons, fresh cheese, and serrano chiles.

(gluten friendly without the crutons)

cup $3.95/ bowl $6.95

Tamales de Camarón (appetizer)

Shrimp tamales made with a rich guajillo chile sauce and filled with seasoned shrimp and vegetables, wrapped in corn husks and steamed to perfection.

(gluten friendly)

$10.95

Cochinita Pibil

One of the representative dishes of the Yucatan Peninsula with its origins in the Mayan culture. It is pork marinated overnight in citrus juices, achiote, and spices that is then wrapped in banana leaves and baked slowly until very tender.

(gluten friendly)

$19.75
